title: Provider Capabilities
description: Declares the feature capabilities of a scheduling provider, allowing clients to adapt their behavior based on what the provider supports.

providerId.description: Unique identifier for the scheduling provider.

providerName.description: Human-readable name of the scheduling provider.

supports_hold.description: Whether the provider supports temporarily holding a slot before confirming.

supports_reschedule.description: Whether the provider supports rescheduling an existing booking to a new slot.

supports_group_booking.description: Whether the provider supports bookings with multiple attendees in a single slot.

supports_meeting_link.description: Whether the provider can auto-generate a video meeting link (e.g. Zoom, Google Meet).

supports_deposit.description: Whether the provider supports collecting a deposit or payment at booking time.

supports_webhooks.description: Whether the provider can send webhook notifications for booking events.

supports_round_robin.description: Whether the provider supports round-robin assignment across multiple staff members.

supports_resource_booking.description: Whether the provider supports booking shared resources (rooms, equipment).

supports_free_busy.description: Whether the provider exposes free/busy information without full slot details.

supports_ics_export.description: Whether the provider can export bookings as iCalendar (.ics) files.

supports_idempotent_writes.description: Whether the provider honors clientIntentId for idempotent booking writes.
